fields.name: last_brief_at
fields.purpose: when the last Operating Brief was generated — prevents duplicate runs
fields.destination_justification: scheduling state for the agent, not a business record

fields.name: previously_flagged_tickets
fields.purpose: ticket keys already flagged in the current day to prevent duplicate alerts
fields.destination_justification: dedup context for same-day runs, cleared daily

fields.name: pending_chase_drafts
fields.purpose: drafted pings awaiting Review gate approval
fields.destination_justification: transient agent queue state, cleared once approved/rejected

fields.name: escalation_tracker
fields.purpose: which tickets have been escalated and their gate status
fields.destination_justification: routing state for RACI ladder, not a business record

explicitly_not_in_memory.reason: historical briefs are business records for trend analysis and audit
append-only audit trail must survive agent restarts
point-in-time Jira state for historical staleness analysis
